arts.ttl: Rashford recalled after four-game Man Utd absence
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has been recalled to Ruben Amorim's Manchester United squad for the visit of Newcastle to Old Trafford, live on Monday Night Football.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford Returns to Manchester United's Squad vs. Newcastle United
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford is back in Manchester United's squad ahead of the Red Devils' Premier League clash with Newcastle United.

arts.ttl: Why isn’t Bruno Fernandes playing for Manchester United against Newcastle in the Premier League today?
arts.sum: Manuel Ugarte was shown his fifth yellow card of the season in the loss to Wolves, also leading to a one-game ban. Premier League rules state that players who receive five yellow cards at any point in their first 19 games are given a one-match suspension .

arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Newcastle LIVE: Premier League team news as Marcus Rashford returns to squad
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim is looking for his third win in the league since taking over in November

arts.ttl: Man United's Marcus Rashford transfer problem confirmed after statement released
arts.sum: Manchester United will make Marcus Rashford will be made available for transfer during the winter transfer window this January after being prepared to sell in the summer

arts.ttl: Agent links make player ‘expressly named’ desire for Amorim at Manchester United – Old Trafford move given ‘preferred option’ status
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim’s association with agent Ignacio Aguillo is pushing the club to sign Nuno Mendes from Paris Saint Germain. That’s according to journalist Sacha Tavolieri, who reports that Aguilo, who runs AS1 Sports, the agency who represent Amorim, Mendes and Bruno Fernandes, is a key player in Manchester United’s interest in the full back. arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Newcastle LIVE! Premier League match stream, latest team news, lineups, TV, prediction
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim looking for much-needed improvement against in-form Magpies

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford set to return to Man Utd squad for Newcastle clash
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford is set to return to the Man Utd squad to face Newcastle.

arts.ttl: Three Man United stars drop team news hints vs Newcastle amid Bruno Fernandes replacement call
arts.sum: Kick-off against Newcastle United is fast-approaching as Ruben Amorim prepares to name his matchday squad at Old Trafford - minus the suspended Bruno Fernandes.

arts.ttl: Shock Marcus Rashford decision made ahead of Manchester United vs Newcastle
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford looks set to be included in the matchday squad for Man United's Premier League clash with Newcastle United.
